## NZXT-ESC Preset Submission

Thank you for contributing a preset to the NZXT-ESC community!

Please fill out the information below and attach your preset file.

---

### Preset Name
<!-- Example: Cyberpunk HUD -->

### Author
<!-- Your name or nickname -->

### Description
Describe what your preset does and what it looks like.

---

### Preset File

Please drag & drop your **preset JSON file** here.

Example: ExportTest1.nzxt-esc-preset.v2.json


---

### Preview Image (optional)

If possible, upload a screenshot or preview image of your preset running on the LCD.

---

### Notes

Anything else you'd like to share about your preset?
